title: DuckDB Metric Types Definition Schema
description: Schema for DuckDB metric type definitions

group.description: The name of the group the metrics belong to

description.description: A description of the metric group

generated.description: Whether the metrics in this group are automatically generated, for example, through other enum values

enum_value.description: The enum value associated with the metric

type.description: The data type of the metric (e.g., double, uint64, string, Value::MAP)

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, bytes, milliseconds, absolute)

is_default.description: Whether the metric is enabled by default

collection_method.description: The method used to collect the metric (e.g., cumulative, timer, query_metric, child, cumulative_operators)

query_root.description: Whether the metric exists in the query root

child.description: The name of the child metric if collection_method is 'child'
